title: Cuneiform Tablet #0835: Neo-Assyrian Court Record
description: A cuneiform tablet from the Neo-Assyrian period — a court record document preserved on clay.
introduction: A cuneiform tablet from the Neo-Assyrian period — a court record document preserved on clay.

translation.text: Cuneiform tablet of the Neo-Assyrian period. Court Record document. Inscribed on clay in cuneiform script. The tablet records court record matters typical of Neo-Assyrian period administrative or literary practice.
